# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted Coding Challenges Meet Cyberpunk Tower Defense
- Summary: Showcase how CodeGrind blends AI-assisted problem solving with the Code Breach cyberpunk game, highlighting real-time editor interactions and tower-defense visualization of programming concepts.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-and-cyberpunk-tower-defense-update
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-and-cyberpunk-tower-defense-update
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-10-codegrind-ai-and-cyberpunk-tower-defense-update.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now integrates Azure OpenAI-powered guidance into our LeetCode-style challenges, paired with the refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk tower-defense visuals. Solve problems in real-time with AI help, while programming concepts are visualized as defensive towers and actions within the game landscape.
- CTA: Try a new AI-assisted problem, watch the cyberpunk towers react to your solutions, and share your fastest problem-solving run.
- Visual brief: Static or animated teaser showing the CodeGrind editor next to a cyberpunk Code Breach battlefield. Include AI assistant panel guiding through a problem, with towers like ForLoop and IfCondition attacking code snippets. Use dark neon palette, concise captions, and a before/after flow of solving a problem.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
